title: UnifaceOccurrence.getFieldType
breadcrumbs: APIs: Java Call-In Classes and Methods
text: UnifaceOccurrence.getFieldType Returns the field type of a specific field. Explain this code int getFieldType (int fieldNumber) Copy Return Values Returns the field type of a specific field, given in the fldNr parameter. Description The constants used for Uniface field types are listed in the following table: Table 1. Field Type Constants Constant Meaning UTYPE_STRING Uniface string UTYPE_BOOLEAN Uniface boolean UTYPE_NUMERIC Uniface numeric UTYPE_FLOAT Uniface float UTYPE_DATE Uniface date UTYPE_TIME Uniface time UTYPE_DATETIME Uniface date time UTYPE_RAW Uniface raw UTYPE_IMAGE Uniface image Was this topic helpful?
